title: Peppery Brazilian Hummus Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious Brazilian-inspired dish featuring a peppery hummus, topped with crispy bacon and crumbled cheese. Perfect for meal prep.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine chickpeas, chorizo, garlic, and 2 tablespoons of olive oil, blending until smooth and creamy.
Mash the mixture until it reaches a smooth consistency, adding more olive oil if necessary.
Transfer the mixture to a bowl and garnish with crumbled cheese, crispy bacon, and a sprinkle of chopped cilantro.
Serve immediately or store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.
